content.problemStatement:
Given a Binary Tree, return true if it is a Balanced Binary Tree else return
    false. A Binary Tree is balanced if, for all nodes in the tree, the difference between left and right subtree height
    is not more than 1..
constraints: 1 <= Number of nodes in the tree <= 10^4
content.inputFormat: The input will be the root of a binary tree, where each node contains an integer value and references to its left and right children.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean value indicating whether the binary tree is balanced.
